allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add frontmatter with allowed-tools to all commands

- init.md: Read, Write, Edit, Bash(mkdir:*)
- plan.md: Read, Write, Edit
- execute.md: Task, Read, Write, Edit, Bash(git:*)
- status.md: Read, Bash(git log:*)
- sync.md: Read

Prevents permission prompts and enables automation.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add lightweight brownfield support to init

- Add "For Existing Codebases" section to init.md
- Add optional Codebase section to CLAUDE.md template
- One paragraph in CLAUDE.md, not 7 separate docs

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add anti-patterns section to CLAUDE.md template

Project-specific guardrails to prevent Claude from repeating
unwanted patterns (e.g., over-engineering, wrong style conventions).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
